script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '========================================'
echo 'PHASE 4+5: FIX EXPOSED PORTS'
echo '========================================'

# --- 4A: Fix WordPress docker-compose (MySQL + WP) ---
echo ''
echo '--- 4A: Reading WP compose ---'
WP_COMPOSE='/opt/claude-chat/mebelit-wp/docker-compose.yml'
cat "$WP_COMPOSE"

echo ''
echo '--- 4A: Fixing WP compose ports ---'
cp "$WP_COMPOSE" "${WP_COMPOSE}.backup.$(date +%s)"

# Replace 0.0.0.0:3306 with 127.0.0.1:3306
sed -i 's/"3306:3306"/"127.0.0.1:3306:3306"/' "$WP_COMPOSE"
sed -i 's/- 3306:3306/- 127.0.0.1:3306:3306/' "$WP_COMPOSE"

# Replace 0.0.0.0:8080 with 127.0.0.1:8080
sed -i 's/"8080:80"/"127.0.0.1:8080:80"/' "$WP_COMPOSE"
sed -i 's/- 8080:80/- 127.0.0.1:8080:80/' "$WP_COMPOSE"

echo 'WP compose after fix:'
grep -A2 'ports:' "$WP_COMPOSE"

# Restart WP containers
echo ''
echo '--- 4A: Restarting WP containers ---'
cd /opt/claude-chat/mebelit-wp && docker compose down && docker compose up -d
echo 'WP containers restarted'

# --- 4B: Fix control-bridge (port 3000) ---
echo ''
echo '--- 4B: Fixing control-bridge (port 3000) ---'
# Check systemd unit
SVC_FILE=$(systemctl show control-bridge -p FragmentPath 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2)
echo "Service file: $SVC_FILE"
if [ -n "$SVC_FILE" ] && [ -f "$SVC_FILE" ]; then
  cat "$SVC_FILE"
  cp "$SVC_FILE" "${SVC_FILE}.backup"
  # Change --host 0.0.0.0 to --host 127.0.0.1
  sed -i 's/--host 0.0.0.0/--host 127.0.0.1/g' "$SVC_FILE"
  systemctl daemon-reload
  systemctl restart control-bridge 2>/dev/null
  echo 'control-bridge restarted on 127.0.0.1'
else
  echo 'No systemd unit found, trying to find startup method'
  ps -p $(pgrep -f 'control-bridge' | head -1) -o args= 2>/dev/null
fi

# --- 4C: Fix webapp (port 8000) ---
echo ''
echo '--- 4C: Fixing webapp (port 8000) ---'
SVC_FILE=$(systemctl show webapp -p FragmentPath 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2)
echo "Service file: $SVC_FILE"
if [ -n "$SVC_FILE" ] && [ -f "$SVC_FILE" ]; then
  cat "$SVC_FILE"
  cp "$SVC_FILE" "${SVC_FILE}.backup"
  sed -i 's/--host 0.0.0.0/--host 127.0.0.1/g' "$SVC_FILE"
  systemctl daemon-reload
  systemctl restart webapp 2>/dev/null
  echo 'webapp restarted on 127.0.0.1'
else
  echo 'No systemd unit found'
  ps -p $(pgrep -f 'port 8000' | head -1) -o args= 2>/dev/null
fi

# --- 4D: Fix upload_server.py (port 9090) ---
echo ''
echo '--- 4D: Fixing upload_server.py (port 9090) ---'
SVC_FILE=$(systemctl show upload-server -p FragmentPath 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2)
echo "Service file: $SVC_FILE"
if [ -n "$SVC_FILE" ] && [ -f "$SVC_FILE" ]; then
  cat "$SVC_FILE"
else
  echo 'No systemd unit, checking process'
  PID=$(ss -tlnp | grep ':9090 ' | grep -oP 'pid=\K[0-9]+')
  if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
    echo "PID=$PID, killing upload_server"
    kill $PID 2>/dev/null
    echo 'upload_server stopped'
  fi
fi

# --- 4E: Fix vk-callback (port 3102) ---
echo ''
echo '--- 4E: Checking vk-callback (port 3102) ---'
SVC_FILE=$(systemctl show vk-callback -p FragmentPath 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2)
echo "Service file: $SVC_FILE"
if [ -n "$SVC_FILE" ] && [ -f "$SVC_FILE" ]; then
  cat "$SVC_FILE"
else
  echo 'Checking /opt/vk-callback/server.js for host binding'
  head -30 /opt/vk-callback/server.js 2>/dev/null
  grep -n 'listen\|host\|0.0.0.0\|port' /opt/vk-callback/server.js 2>/dev/null
fi

# --- 4F: Stop github-webhook if broken ---
echo ''
echo '--- 4F: github-webhook status ---'
systemctl status github-webhook 2>/dev/null | head -8
if systemctl is-active github-webhook 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'activating\|failed'; then
  echo 'github-webhook is broken, stopping'
  systemctl stop github-webhook
  systemctl disable github-webhook
  echo 'github-webhook stopped and disabled'
fi

echo ''
echo '--- VERIFICATION: What is still on 0.0.0.0? ---'
ss -tlnp | grep '0.0.0.0' | grep -v '127.0.0.1'

echo ''
echo '========================================'
echo 'PHASE 4+5 COMPLETE'
echo '========================================'
intent: Phase 4+5: Fix Docker ports, bind services to localhost, stop broken services
